description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden load platform with raised side rails and a flat, solid surface for carrying goods. The cart is supported by two large, polygonal wheels mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two long, parallel wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The side rails are constructed from the same wood as the platform, offering containment for items during transport. The wheels appear to be made of a darker material, possibly metal or painted wood, contrasting with the brown body. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban transport of medium to heavy loads.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with raised side rails, two large rear wheels, and long front handles for manual transport. The flat load platform is designed for carrying goods securely in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart, the flat load platform, and the two long handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large rear wheel, the raised side rails, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the load platform, the side rails, and both wheels clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wheel, the side rails, and the handles extending backward.
